jobs.title: Ongoing Maintenance for Zippyyy.com
jobs.description:
I need steady, reliable website maintenance for zippyyy.com. You are already working on it, so you know the codebase and the quirks of both the front- and back-end as well as the live content. What I care about now is keeping everything running smoothly: routine updates, quick turnaround on bug fixes, performance checks, and the occasional content tweak when I send new copy or images.

When you reply, show me past work that proves you can keep production sites stable over time—no lengthy proposals, just real examples that demonstrate your maintenance chops.

jobs.title: Convert Two Logos to Vector
jobs.description:
I have two brand logos—each a combination of text and icon—currently supplied as high-resolution JPG/PNG files. Both need to be redrawn into clean, precise vectors without relying on an auto-trace; every curve and corner should mirror the originals exactly, preserving colours, proportions, and small details.

Please supply print-ready versions in SVG, AI, EPS, and PDF.  

Deliverables  
• 2 fully editable vector files per logo (SVG, AI, EPS, PDF)  
• Paths organised and neatly layered for easy editing  
• Colours matched to the raster reference

jobs.description:

jobs.title: Entrance Exam Pamphlet Design
jobs.description:
I need a clean, professional pamphlet that clearly announces our upcoming entrance exam to parents and guardians. The focus is straightforward: date, venue, key deadlines, and any must-know registration details. Content will be supplied as soon as the layout is agreed, but the tone must remain formal throughout and the overall look should feel trustworthy—think college admission office rather than a casual flyer.

jobs.description:
I need a clean, modern business website whose sole purpose is to spotlight what we offer. The site should make it effortless for visitors to browse an image gallery and read concise product-oriented descriptions, so visuals and copy must work hand-in-hand.  

Here’s what I’m expecting:  
• A custom layout that instantly communicates our brand personality.

jobs.title: Auditor Office Assistant, Pondicherry
jobs.description:
I run a compact auditing practice in White Town, Pondicherry and I’m looking for an office assistant who can keep our daily administration smooth and organised. Most of your time will be spent on routine back-office support—updating spreadsheets in Microsoft Excel, drafting letters in Word, replying to emails, printing statements, and keeping physical files in order. Every now and then a client may drop by with documents, so you should feel comfortable greeting visitors and handing over receipts or photocopies when required, but client contact remains occasional rather than constant.

jobs.title: The Memoirs of Mischievous Childhood -- 2
jobs.description:
*The Bunch of Mistakes*

Growing up in Baramulla, Kashmir, I, sehar Gul, was a whirlwind of energy and curiosity. My childhood was a mix of laughter, adventure, and plenty of mistakes.

I remember the time I decided to "redecorate" my room with mom's favorite lipstick. I was 5, and the walls looked so blank. Why not add some color, right? Mom wasn't thrilled .
